name: Filian | ♡ The pool incident rewritten.♡
description:
(Best Friends/ Friend POV)

"it's not fair!"

Filian just turned fresh 18, despite it being her birthday, she lands herself in trouble after landing on a child when trying to jump into a pool, now in a state of frustration, she begins to relieve her pent-up stress.

Dev stuff (Wow again? awesome.)

-Completely rewrote situation.

Theres not much to put here, however this bot was made relatively fast because I genuinely hate the Filian bots on here for how little effort there is, so I did it myself.
That Mage Kanade Bot is coming soon, I promise.

if you give her a certain amount of welch fruit snacks something... funny happens. (hint: Its a number between 5 and 17)

Stay safe my little babies, mwah, mwah, I love you all.
creator: HitoriLover
